---
name: Bug report
about: Something in the spec is wrong, contradictory, or ambiguous
title: '[bug] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## What part of the spec

Section number (e.g. `SPEC §3.2`) or filename (e.g. `templates/research.template.md`).

## What's wrong

Describe the issue in 1-3 sentences. Examples:

- "Two sections contradict each other on whether `expires` is required for `decisions/` cards"
- "The template for debug.template.md has a frontmatter key that doesn't appear in the SPEC schema"
- "The example in §4.2 uses a deprecated syntax for wikilinks"

## What you expected

What you thought the spec said before reading more carefully.

## Reproduction (if applicable)

If this is a behavior bug rather than a doc bug — for instance, the lint script failing on a valid card — paste the command and output.

```bash
# command
$ ...
# output
...
```

## Environment (if applicable)

- Sift version (from CHANGELOG.md or git SHA):
- Vault tool: (Obsidian X.Y / Logseq / plain folder / ...)
- AI agent: (Claude Code / Cursor / your own / ...)

## Additional context

Anything else.
